claims.summary: The telemetry subscriber maintains a persistent WebSocket with bounded reconnect backoff.
claims.disposition: Verify current connection, shutdown, receive, and backoff branches from source and tests.

claims.summary: Socket connection is not equivalent to recent schema-valid telemetry.
claims.disposition: Verify status separates connection, first valid packet, latest valid packet, cadence, and integration freshness.

claims.summary: The current subscriber has no payload-idle timeout, so a half-open connected socket can remain silent.
claims.disposition: Observe the source-level absence and route a bounded lock-wait and approximately 31-second pulse profile through sandbox evidence.

claims.summary: Adding an idle timeout or changing reconnect cadence alters live telemetry admission.
claims.disposition: Hold timeout, reconnect, and cadence changes behind exact Mike/operator approval.
